#DateCategoryDescriptionQtyAmountActions
#DateNameCompanyRequiredPaidRemainingReq. Interest %StatusNotesActions
Returned Investments - This section displays investments that have been marked as "Paid" in the Investments section. When an investor returns their investment, it will automatically appear here.
#Investment DateInvestor NameCompanyOriginal AmountAmount PaidInterest %StatusNotesActions
Automatic Receivable Loans: This section displays unpaid transactions from booking forms (Tickets, Visas, Cargo, Transportation). These are automatically created when customers book services but haven't completed payment. When payments are received, these loans are automatically moved to the "Received Loans" section.
#IssuedBorrowerStatusDueAmountCommissionRemaining PaymentTransaction DetailsSourceActions
Received Loans - This section automatically displays customers who have fully repaid their loans. When a receivable loan status is changed to "Paid", it automatically appears here.
#Original Loan DateCustomerStatusDue DateAmountNotesActions
